hero.title1: Book and unlock your utility van in seconds
hero.subtitle:
Smart rental.
Available 24/7 on the Swiss Riviera.

why.digitalDesc: 100% online booking and access, no paperwork.

reassurance.insuranceDesc: Liability and comprehensive included. Reduced deductible available with the Serenity option.
reassurance.bookingDesc: Book online in 3 steps. Pickup available 24/7.
reassurance.areaDesc: We cover the entire Riviera and beyond.
reassurance.supportDesc: Roadside assistance and customer support available at all times.

cta.title: Ready to go?
cta.subtitle: Book your utility van in a few clicks. Pickup available 24/7.

vehicles.title: Our vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: Discover our fleet of connected utility vehicles. All our vans are recent, well-maintained, and equipped for your professional needs.

rates.title: Rates
rates.subtitle: Transparent pricing, VAT 8.1% included. Extra km: {{rate}} CHF/km.
rates.hubText: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub.
rates.standardHook: The essentials, at the best price.
standardIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
confortIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
Sérénité+ included: deductible reduced to CHF 500 (instead of CHF 2,000)
premiumIncludes: Pick-up & return at the Vevey Hub
rates.packAntiCompare: Designed for moving: kit included + more km, to avoid surcharges.
rates.extraKmDesc: Each plan includes a km allowance (100 km/day for Weekday and Weekend, 200 km for the 48h Pack). Beyond that, each extra kilometre is charged at
rates.proCalloutText: Access our business offers (invoicing, dedicated conditions, priority based on availability).

reservation.title: Quick booking
reservation.subtitle: Book online in 3 steps. Pickup available 24/7.
reservation.microlegal: Booking is confirmed once LogIQ Transport validates the reservation.
reservation.paymentCanceled: Payment cancelled. You can try again.
reservation.successDesc: Your booking request has been sent successfully. We'll get back to you shortly by email to confirm the details.
reservation.sereniteInfo: Reduces the standard deductible from CHF 2,000 to CHF 500 per claim

pro.title: For Pros — Self-service vans, business invoicing
pro.subtitle: Online booking, autonomous pickup, ideal for tradespeople, property managers, movers, and events.
pro.flexConditions: Prices excl. VAT • VAT 8.1% added • 200 km/day included • Immediate payment
pro.carnetsConditions: Prepaid • Weekdays only (Mon–Thu) • 100% upfront payment • Non-refundable • 24/7 access • Booking priority included • Advance booking recommended
pro.paymentImmediate: Immediate payment (card / payment link) by default.
pro.paymentInvoice: Net-30 invoicing may be offered to select Pro accounts after validation.
pro.ruleDriver: Driver must be 21+ with B licence held for 2+ years (as per T&Cs).
pro.ruleFuel: Vehicle returned with the same fuel level.
pro.ruleDeposit: Card hold required before departure (as per T&Cs).
pro.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you within 24h.
pro.formThanksDesc: Our Pro team will contact you within 24 business hours.
pro.bottomCtaSubtitle: Degressive pro rates, business invoicing, 100% online booking.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question? We're here to help.
contact.name: Full name
contact.thanksDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Connected utility vehicle rental on the Swiss Riviera. Professional and reliable service.
footer.copyright: © 2026 LogIQ Transport Sàrl — All rights reserved

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. Under Swiss data protection law (nFADP), your explicit consent is required.

chatbot.title: LogIQ Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm the LogIQ assistant. Are you an individual or a professional?
chatbot.greetingPro: Welcome to the **Pro** area! I can help with business rates, invoicing, or Pro Booklets. How can I assist you?
chatbot.greetingParticulier: Hello! I can help you choose a vehicle, estimate a price, or answer your questions. How can I help?
chatbot.proactive: Need help choosing your van or estimating a price? 💬
